Guide on Downloading CellPyAbility for MacOS
1. Download Homebrew 
2. Download Python 3.12.9 from Python Downloader which has Tkinter module already
3. Open Terminal
4. Direct path: cd Documents 
5. Make Python environment via /usr/local/bin/python3.12 -m venv ~/Documents/cellpy_env312
6. Activate environment: source ~/Documents/cellpy_env312/bin/activate
7. Upgrade pip: pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel
8. pip install matplotlib, numpy, pandas, plotly
9. Test tkinter (GUI pops up): python -c "import tkinter; tkinter._test()"
10. Run script: python ~/Documents/CellPyAbility/CellPyAbility_py/CellPyAbility_GDA.py

Note: If a tasks.json was created then just open it up in VSC then Shift+Command+B then select script to run

Without VSC: bc json file doesn't work 
1. Open Terminal
2. Activate environment: source ~/Documents/cellpy_env312/bin/activate
3. Run Script: python ~/Documents/CellPyAbility/CellPyAbility_py/CellPyAbility_Synergy.py
